description: PERMANENT model policy for all AInchors agents. Warden enforces this. Changes require Ken approval + CHG entry + baseline update.
approvalContext: CHG-0621: Yoda+Aria trial swap to kimi-k2.7-code. Trial until Sun 22 Jun 10:00 AEST.

userFacing.description: Agents that interact directly with humans (Ken, Angie) via webchat or Telegram
userFacing.rationale: CHG-0596 (2026-06-15 17:57 AEST): Ken directive — Yoda + Aria (user-facing) swap to deepseek-v4-pro. minimax restricted to T3 specialists. Replaces CHG-0498 trial primary. Reason: L-106 second trigger (msg 4930 confabulation of Posts 2+3 from canonical 4-week arc). Previous trial verdict (PARTIAL, 13 Jun 13:13) confirmed: minimax NOT suitable for engagement/interactive/planning work.

backend.description: Backend governance/architecture agents (Shield, Lex, Warden, Atlas, Thrawn, Lando, Mon Mothma). NOT T3 specialists.
backend.rationale: CHG-0596 + CHG-0597: qa/infra moved to t3Technical tier. Backend stays on gemma4:31b-cloud.
backend.exceptionNote: These agents use a different primary than the tier default. Drift check should verify against individual assignment.

trialMiniMaxM3.description: CHG-0498: TERMINATED 2026-06-15 17:57 (CHG-0596). Agents moved to t3Technical (minimax) or t3Business (kimi).
trialMiniMaxM3.rationale: CHG-0596 (2026-06-15 17:57 AEST): Trial terminated early by Ken. Replaced by permanent T3 specialist tier (see agentTiers.t3Specialists). Trial verdict (PARTIAL 2026-06-13 13:13) confirmed: minimax suitable for engineering/dominant work, NOT for user-facing engagement/planning.
trialMiniMaxM3.status: TERMINATED — not a trial anymore; minimax assigned to T3 specialists per CHG-0596

higherQuality.description: CHG-0500: Higher-quality tier for tasks needing best-in-class reasoning. Opt-in per CREST phase model map. Anthropic Sonnet/Opus when available; falls back to Ollama Cloud T2. Default tier for new cognitive work post-OC2.
higherQuality.rationale: CHG-0500: CREST v1.3 phase model map allows higher-tier for Plan/Verify/Replan. Anthropic Sonnet first choice when credits available, Ollama Cloud T2 fallback. Not a special trigger — one option in the matrix. [INACTIVE: tier exists in policy as the structural model-task matrix option, but no agent is currently routed to Anthropic models. When Ken provides credits, this tier becomes active and agents are assigned per CREST v1.3 phase model map.]
higherQuality.activationGate: Anthropic API key rotation + CHG-record + Ken approval (per CHG-0500 + CREST v1.3 phase map)

t3Technical.description: CHG-0597 (Ken 2026-06-15 18:48 AEST): T3 technical specialist agents (Sage, Forge, Ahsoka, Luthen) on minimax-m3:cloud. Yoda-on-deepseek verifies all outputs.
t3Technical.rationale: CHG-0597: Ken directive — technical stream T3 specialists use minimax. Engineering/scripting/dispatch work.
t3Technical.monitoredBy: Yoda (deepseek-v4-pro) per CREST v1.3 plan/verify/replan cycle

t3Business.description: CHG-0597 (Ken 2026-06-15 18:48 AEST): T3 business specialist agent (Spark) on kimi-k2.6:cloud. Content/engagement/social work.
t3Business.rationale: CHG-0597: Ken directive — business stream T3 specialist uses kimi. Content generation/engagement work where minimax was found unsuitable (L-106).
t3Business.monitoredBy: Yoda (deepseek-v4-pro) per CREST v1.3 plan/verify/replan cycle

main.modelChangeNote: CHG-0621: deepseek-v4-pro → kimi-k2.7-code trial (Sun 22 Jun 10:00 AEST). Pro retained as first fallback.

business.modelChangeNote: CHG-0621: deepseek-v4-pro → kimi-k2.7-code trial (Sun 22 Jun 10:00 AEST). Pro retained as first fallback.

qa.modelChangeNote: CHG-0596: stays on minimax (T3 specialist tier per Ken directive)

infra._crestNote: TKT-0383: Forge uses flash for Plan+Execute+Synthesize. Pro for Verify+Replan only. Flash-as-primary is intentional.
infra.modelChangeNote: CHG-0596: stays on minimax (T3 specialist tier per Ken directive)

change-mgt.description: Mon Mothma 🌟 — Digital Transformation CM Specialist

ahsoka.modelChangeNote: CHG-0596: stays on minimax (T3 specialist tier per Ken directive)

luthen.modelChangeNote: CHG-0596: stays on minimax (T3 specialist tier per Ken directive)

social.modelChangeNote: CHG-0596: stays on minimax (T3 specialist tier per Ken directive)

cronModelPolicy.description: All isolated agentTurn crons use gemma4:31b-cloud with kimi fallback. Exception: Morning Stand-Up uses kimi primary (Ken-approved).

kimiPolicy.allowedUse: standup + email cron + routine single-thread background non-interactive tasks only
kimiPolicy.prohibitedUse: complex orchestration, multi-ticket routing, state tracking, CHG decisions

changeControl.process: 1. Ken approval in webchat/Telegram. 2. Update this file. 3. Update critical-config-baseline.json. 4. Log CHG entry. 5. Update MEMORY.md.

crestPhaseModelMap.description: CREST v1.2 §5.8 — Per-agent, per-phase model assignments. Warden uses this for phase-aware compliance (TKT-0383).

pro.label: Plan / Verify / Replan
pro.fallbackRule: Retry pro → kimi. Never degrade pro → flash.

flash.label: Execute / Synthesize
flash.fallbackRule: Flash → pro escalation. Cheap → expensive, not cheap → cheaper.

forge._note: EXCEPTION: Plan uses flash, not pro. Infra/SRE planning is bounded and deterministic. Pro reserved for Verify/Replan only.

_note: CREST phase model assignments added per TKT-0383. Forge flash-for-Plan is intentional — do not flag as violation.
_note_previous: This is a clean v2.0 rebuild. All interim flags, Anthropic model references, and stale policy fields removed. Anthropic models (sonnet, haiku, opus) are NOT currently approved or expected on any agent.
note: Resynced agentTiers to match actual openclaw.json agent configs. Per-agent exceptions documented. Allowed fallback chain = [deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2.6] or [gemma4:31b-cloud, deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2.6] depending on agent primary.

crestV13Transition.rationale: CHG-0500: CREST v1.3 + TKT-0368 provide structural guards for risky state manipulation. Anthropic models are no longer a special trigger — they are one option in the model-task matrix alongside Ollama Cloud models. Ken issues CLAUDE RECONFIGURE keyword; Conservative Mode flag lifted.
crestV13Transition.riskFramework: CREST v1.3 (target) + TKT-0368 — Plan→Verify→Replan gates, RVEV cycle, 2-Pass Contract, dispatch-validate.sh, model-task matrix

rollout.phase2_pending: TKT-0368: CREST v1.3 implementation (3-area: execution, token economics, memory)
rollout.phase3_pending: CREST v1.3 doc lock (Atlas + Thrawn review)

lessons.rule: Do not confabulate explanations for behavior changes. If you don't know why something changed, say so. State 'I don't know' instead of constructing a plausible narrative. Especially for model/agent/cost claims — always check the SSOT (model-policy.json, runtime metadata) before stating.
lessons.precedent: L-084 (2026-06-12): same class, model (self) fabricated 31 CHG records in a compacted summary, claimed 'sweep complete'. Permanent rule: never claim completion from a summary. Always re-run gate after context boundary.
